message:
fix(db): add sequence tracking to S3-FIFO cache to prevent ghost entry amnesia

Node variants now carry a seq counter that is checked during eviction,
preventing a bug where a key could be re-inserted, removed, re-inserted
again, and then lose its ghost status when the original ghost queue
entry was purged. Diagnostic methods (ghost_len, small_len, main_len)
now report live counts instead of raw queue lengths, and keys() skips
tombstones. Includes a regression test for the ghost-forgotten scenario.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
